metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the freight-logistics-orchestration domain.

rootGroups.name: Shipper Control Tower
rootGroups.description: Planning, procurement, TMS, tendering, and shipper-facing orchestration workflows.

subGroups.name: Planning and procurement
subGroups.description: Network design, lane planning, bid events, contract awards, and rate governance.

bricks.name: Network Planning Workspace
bricks.description: Workspace for freight demand planning, lane design, service policies, mode selection, constraints, and scenario comparison.

internalModules.title: Lane planning model
internalModules.description: Combines shipper demand, facilities, commodities, service levels, equipment, and historical cost into lane plans.

interfaces.title: Shipper planning UI
interfaces.description: Scenario planning and lane policy workspace for transportation teams.

brickDependencies.description: Uses historical and market rate intelligence in planning scenarios.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: ERP and order management systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Reads order, replenishment, inventory, and facility demand signals.

dataDependencies.description: Reads and updates lane, facility, mode, and service-policy data.

bricks.name: Contract Procurement and Bid Events
bricks.description: Mini-bids, annual RFPs, carrier award capture, rate sheets, routing guide commitments, and bid analytics.

internalModules.title: Bid event manager
internalModules.description: Controls bid rounds, invited carriers, lane packages, award rules, and commitment capture.

interfaces.title: Procurement UI
interfaces.description: Bid event setup, analysis, and award workflow.

interfaces.title: Carrier bid portal
interfaces.description: Carrier-facing bid response surface.

brickDependencies.description: Requires carrier compliance and equipment eligibility before award.

dataDependencies.description: Creates and updates contract rates, award terms, and routing guide data.

bricks.name: Rate Intelligence and Benchmarking
bricks.description: Market, lane, historical, and customer-specific rate intelligence for procurement, spot quoting, pricing guidance, and margin controls.

internalModules.title: Lane benchmark service
internalModules.description: Produces shipper-facing and internal rate guidance with confidence ranges and mode context.

interfaces.title: Rate intelligence API
interfaces.description: Provides rate guidance to planning, procurement, quoting, and tender fallback workflows.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Freight market data providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Uses benchmark rates and market capacity indicators where licensed.

dataDependencies.description: Reads internal and third-party lane rate signals.

bricks.name: Mode and Service Optimization
bricks.description: Recommends truckload, LTL, intermodal, consolidation, cross-dock, dedicated, or expedited options based on cost, service, emissions, and risk.

internalModules.title: Mode recommendation engine
internalModules.description: Scores available modes using shipment constraints, lane history, appointment windows, and service policies.

interfaces.title: Mode recommendation API
interfaces.description: Provides options to TMS, planning, and operations workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shipper mode policies, facilities, and service constraints.

dataDependencies.description: Reads shipment and outcome history.

subGroups.name: Tendering and shipper experience
subGroups.description: Transportation management, routing guide execution, shipper portal, and customer communications.

bricks.name: Transportation Management System
bricks.description: Core shipment, order, load, routing guide, tender, appointment, execution, and settlement workflow for shippers and managed transportation teams.

internalModules.title: Shipment lifecycle service
internalModules.description: Maintains canonical shipment state from planned load through delivered and settled.

interfaces.title: Shipper TMS UI
interfaces.description: Web workspace for shipment planning, tendering, tracking, and exception management.

brickDependencies.description: Uses tender workflow to assign shipments to carriers.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: ERP, WMS, OMS, and EDI gateways
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Imports orders, shipment requests, warehouse events, and customer references.

dataDependencies.description: Owns canonical shipment and load lifecycle state.

bricks.name: Tendering and Routing Guide
bricks.description: Automated primary, backup, waterfall, spot fallback, and managed-service tendering against shipper routing guides and carrier commitments.

internalModules.title: Tender sequencing engine
internalModules.description: Runs tender acceptance windows, routing guide order, fallback rules, and rejection handling.

interfaces.title: Tender API
interfaces.description: Creates tenders and receives accept, reject, timeout, or counter events.

brickDependencies.description: Uses match scores when contract routing guide coverage fails.

dataDependencies.description: Records tender offers, responses, timeouts, and fallback outcomes.

bricks.name: Shipper Portal and Self-Service
bricks.description: Shipper-facing portal for quote requests, shipment creation, booking, tracking, reporting, documents, invoices, and support.

internalModules.title: Self-service shipment composer
internalModules.description: Guides shipment creation, quote selection, required references, and service options.

interfaces.title: Shipper web portal
interfaces.description: Primary self-service web experience for shippers.

brickDependencies.description: Displays instant and managed quotes for transactional shippers.

dataDependencies.description: Reads account, permissions, billing, and service preferences.

bricks.name: Customer Integration Gateway
bricks.description: EDI, API, webhook, file, and partner integrations for orders, tenders, milestones, documents, invoices, appointments, and master data.

internalModules.title: Integration mapping engine
internalModules.description: Maps customer-specific fields, events, references, and validation rules into canonical models.

interfaces.title: Customer API and EDI gateway
interfaces.description: External interface for customer systems and integration partners.

brickDependencies.description: Feeds canonical shipment creation and update events.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Customer ERP, WMS, OMS, and finance systems

dataDependencies.description: Stores integration payloads, mappings, validation results, and replay state.

rootGroups.name: Capacity Marketplace
rootGroups.description: Carrier network, compliance, offer matching, brokerage, load board, and capacity acquisition workflows.

subGroups.name: Carrier network
subGroups.description: Carrier onboarding, compliance, quality, equipment, preferences, and performance management.

bricks.name: Carrier Onboarding and Compliance
bricks.description: Carrier identity, authority, insurance, safety, tax, bank, equipment, fraud risk, and eligibility onboarding.

internalModules.title: Carrier compliance verifier
internalModules.description: Checks authority, insurance, safety ratings, sanctions, tax, and banking requirements.

interfaces.title: Carrier onboarding portal
interfaces.description: Carrier-facing onboarding and compliance update flow.

brickDependencies.description: Uses fraud and compliance controls before work access.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Government authority and insurance data sources
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Verifies motor carrier authority and compliance status.

dataDependencies.description: Owns carrier account, authority, insurance, equipment, and compliance state.

bricks.name: Carrier Scorecards and Quality
bricks.description: Carrier performance, eligibility, service, claims, tracking, fraud, facility behavior, and improvement feedback.

internalModules.title: Carrier quality scorer
internalModules.description: Aggregates service, tracking, claims, payment, and compliance events into quality scores.

interfaces.title: Carrier scorecard API
interfaces.description: Provides carrier quality data to matching, procurement, and carrier-facing reporting.

brickDependencies.description: Uses pickup, delivery, tracking, and exception history.

dataDependencies.description: Computes carrier quality and performance history.

bricks.name: Carrier Preferences and Availability
bricks.description: Carrier lane preferences, equipment availability, reload needs, preferred facilities, blackout windows, and operating constraints.

internalModules.title: Preference profile service
internalModules.description: Maintains carrier preferences and inferred availability by lane, equipment, and facility.

interfaces.title: Preference API
interfaces.description: Feeds matching, offer, and procurement workflows.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: ELD and telematics partners
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Optional location and availability signals for consenting carriers.

dataDependencies.description: Stores explicit and inferred carrier availability and preferences.

bricks.name: Facility Profile and Dwell Intelligence
bricks.description: Facility addresses, geofences, instructions, appointment rules, dwell patterns, lumper rules, parking, contact, and risk signals.

internalModules.title: Dwell intelligence service
internalModules.description: Learns facility dwell, appointment, and access risk from live and historical loads.

interfaces.title: Facility profile API
interfaces.description: Provides facility rules and dwell risk to carriers, shippers, operations, and pricing.

brickDependencies.description: Uses arrival, dwell, and departure events.

dataDependencies.description: Stores facility master data, operating instructions, and learned dwell metrics.

subGroups.name: Load matching and brokerage
subGroups.description: Load offers, spot quoting, dynamic pricing, matching, and transactional brokerage execution.

bricks.name: Load Offer and Booking
bricks.description: Carrier-facing load board, targeted offers, booking flow, offer details, acceptance, cancellation, and booking confirmation.

internalModules.title: Offer composer
internalModules.description: Builds carrier-facing offer cards with rate, commodity, facility, appointment, equipment, and service requirements.

interfaces.title: Carrier web and mobile offers
interfaces.description: Carrier-facing offer discovery and booking surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Targets offers to eligible carriers based on fit and performance.

dataDependencies.description: Stores offer content, targeting, acceptance, rejection, and cancellation events.

bricks.name: Carrier Matching Engine
bricks.description: Ranks carriers for loads using lane fit, equipment, location, preferences, compliance, quality, price, reload potential, and facility history.

internalModules.title: Carrier-load fit model
internalModules.description: Scores candidate carriers and explains matching factors to brokerage and operations users.

interfaces.title: Matching API
interfaces.description: Returns candidate carriers, scores, and reason codes.

brickDependencies.description: Uses carrier service and compliance performance.
Uses explicit and inferred carrier preferences.

dataDependencies.description: Reads features for carrier-load matching.

bricks.name: Spot Quoting and Dynamic Pricing
bricks.description: Instant and assisted spot quotes, price confidence, buy/sell guidance, quote expiration, and margin guardrails.

internalModules.title: Dynamic price service
internalModules.description: Combines market rates, capacity signals, urgency, facility risk, and margin policy into quote recommendations.

interfaces.title: Spot quote UI
interfaces.description: Shipper and internal quoting workspace.

brickDependencies.description: Uses market and historical rates for price guidance.

dataDependencies.description: Stores quote requests, recommendations, accepted prices, and margin outcomes.

bricks.name: Drop Trailer and Dedicated Capacity
bricks.description: Drop trailer pools, dedicated fleet commitments, trailer availability, yard state, and asset-light dedicated capacity programs.

internalModules.title: Trailer pool planner
internalModules.description: Tracks trailer pools, cycle time, facility needs, and carrier commitments.

interfaces.title: Dedicated capacity API
interfaces.description: Exposes drop trailer and dedicated program availability to planning and tender workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses yard, dock, and dwell constraints.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Trailer telematics and yard systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Tracks trailer location and yard state where integrated.

dataDependencies.description: Stores dedicated and drop trailer capacity commitments.

rootGroups.name: Execution and Visibility
rootGroups.description: Shipment execution, tracking, appointments, exceptions, documents, operations, and communications.

subGroups.name: Shipment execution
subGroups.description: Visibility, tracking, appointments, documents, and facility execution.

bricks.name: Real-Time Visibility and ETA
bricks.description: Shipment tracking, milestones, live location, ETA prediction, geofence events, stop status, and visibility data quality.

internalModules.title: ETA prediction service
internalModules.description: Predicts arrival and delivery risk using route, location, facility, weather, and historical data.

interfaces.title: Visibility API
interfaces.description: Provides shipment milestones, ETA, and tracking data to portals, operations, and customers.

brickDependencies.description: Consumes tracking, ELD, telematics, and check-call events.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Telematics, ELD, mobile, rail, ocean, and parcel visibility feeds
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Receives multimodal location and milestone events.

dataDependencies.description: Stores milestones, ETA predictions, geofences, and tracking quality data.

bricks.name: Carrier Tracking and Check Calls
bricks.description: Carrier mobile tracking, ELD consent, telematics ingestion, check calls, milestone confirmation, and tracking compliance workflows.

internalModules.title: Tracking consent and source selector
internalModules.description: Chooses the best tracking source and manages consent and fallback check-call workflows.

interfaces.title: Carrier tracking UI
interfaces.description: Carrier and operations surfaces for status updates and tracking issue resolution.

brickDependencies.description: Links tracking source and consent to carrier and driver records.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Mobile, ELD, and telematics providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Captures live and event-based tracking data.

dataDependencies.description: Stores tracking signals, source quality, and check-call events.

bricks.name: Appointment and Dock Scheduling
bricks.description: Pickup and delivery appointment booking, dock calendars, rescheduling, facility capacity, and warehouse readiness coordination.

internalModules.title: Appointment scheduler
internalModules.description: Matches shipment requirements to facility dock availability and appointment rules.

interfaces.title: Appointment UI and API
interfaces.description: Facility, shipper, carrier, and operations appointment workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses facility hours, dock rules, dwell, and special handling constraints.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Warehouse dock scheduling systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Integrates with shipper and third-party appointment tools.

dataDependencies.description: Stores dock appointments, reschedules, no-shows, and facility capacity.

bricks.name: Document Capture and Validation
bricks.description: Proof of delivery, bills of lading, lumper receipts, scale tickets, customs documents, claims evidence, OCR, validation, and missing document workflows.

internalModules.title: Document validation service
internalModules.description: Extracts and validates shipment, amount, date, location, and reference fields from documents.

interfaces.title: Document upload and review UI
interfaces.description: Carrier, operations, and shipper document workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Validates documents against canonical shipment records.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: OCR and document AI providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Supports document extraction and classification where used.

dataDependencies.description: Stores document metadata, extracted fields, validation state, and retention policy.

subGroups.name: Operations and recovery
subGroups.description: Control tower queues, exception management, communications, and workflow automation.

bricks.name: Operations Control Tower
bricks.description: Unified operations workspace for load queues, customer commitments, carrier activity, exceptions, communications, documents, and escalations.

internalModules.title: Work queue orchestrator
internalModules.description: Composes operator queues by customer priority, shipment risk, SLA, margin, and automation state.

interfaces.title: Control tower UI
interfaces.description: Primary workspace for brokerage and managed transportation operations teams.

brickDependencies.description: Uses ranked exceptions and recommended recovery actions.

dataDependencies.description: Stores work queues, ownership, notes, case states, and escalation outcomes.

bricks.name: Exception Management Workbench
bricks.description: Detects, prioritizes, explains, and guides recovery for tender, pickup, tracking, appointment, document, invoice, and service exceptions.

internalModules.title: Exception risk scorer
internalModules.description: Scores exception severity using service risk, customer importance, margin impact, and recovery window.

interfaces.title: Exception API
interfaces.description: Feeds control tower queues and customer-facing status surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses tracking, ETA, and milestone anomalies.

dataDependencies.description: Stores detected exceptions, severity, ownership, recovery actions, and closure reasons.

bricks.name: Customer and Carrier Communications
bricks.description: Threaded and auditable communication across email, SMS, portal messages, API events, EDI status, call notes, and customer updates.

internalModules.title: Communication timeline service
internalModules.description: Connects messages, shipment references, parties, and escalation decisions into one timeline.

interfaces.title: Communications inbox
interfaces.description: Operations workspace for outbound and inbound customer and carrier communication.

brickDependencies.description: Links messages to the correct shipment and case context.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Email, SMS, voice, EDI, and customer messaging systems

dataDependencies.description: Stores conversations, participants, channels, and audit history.

bricks.name: Workflow Automation and Agents
bricks.description: Rules, agents, and playbooks for tender follow-up, status requests, document collection, invoice checks, customer updates, and escalation routing.

internalModules.title: Automation policy engine
internalModules.description: Executes workflow actions with guardrails, approvals, audit logs, and fallback to humans.

interfaces.title: Automation management UI
interfaces.description: Operations and product controls for playbooks, rules, approvals, and outcomes.

brickDependencies.description: Consumes and updates operations cases.

dataDependencies.description: Stores automation decisions, approvals, actions, outcomes, and audit traces.

rootGroups.name: Financial and Intelligence Foundations
rootGroups.description: Settlement, audit, claims, identity, risk, analytics, experimentation, and platform foundations.

subGroups.name: Finance and risk
subGroups.description: Freight audit, settlement, payments, claims, compliance risk, and identity controls.

bricks.name: Freight Audit and Accruals
bricks.description: Freight bill audit, accessorial validation, fuel, detention, accruals, cost allocation, and invoice exception detection.

internalModules.title: Invoice matching engine
internalModules.description: Compares invoice lines against shipment, rate, document, accessorial, and contract data.

interfaces.title: Freight audit API
interfaces.description: Exposes invoice validation and accrual outputs to finance and settlement workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses proof and supporting documents before invoice approval.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Customer ERP and finance systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Receives invoice and cost allocation data.

dataDependencies.description: Stores invoice lines, audit results, accruals, disputes, and allocation data.

bricks.name: Settlement, Payments and Claims
bricks.description: Carrier payment, shipper billing, accessorial adjustments, claims, chargebacks, payment status, tax, and financial reconciliation.

internalModules.title: Settlement ledger
internalModules.description: Tracks payable, receivable, adjustment, claim, and settlement lifecycle by shipment.

interfaces.title: Settlement API
interfaces.description: Provides payment and claims state to shipper, carrier, and operations workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Settles only validated or approved invoice lines.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Payment processors, banks, ERP, and tax systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Executes payment, billing, and reconciliation transactions.

dataDependencies.description: Stores receivables, payables, claims, adjustments, payment status, and ledger references.

bricks.name: Identity, Fraud and Compliance Risk
bricks.description: Shipper and carrier identity, account access, cargo theft risk, compliance screening, sanctions, fraud detection, and policy controls.

internalModules.title: Freight fraud risk engine
internalModules.description: Detects suspicious carrier, payment, document, identity, and load-tender patterns.

interfaces.title: Risk decision API
interfaces.description: Returns risk decisions and required controls to onboarding, booking, payment, and operations workflows.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Identity, sanctions, insurance, and carrier authority data providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Supports eligibility, risk, and compliance decisions.

dataDependencies.description: Stores risk signals, decisions, overrides, reviews, and audit trails.

bricks.name: Fuel, Accessorial and Detention Rules
bricks.description: Fuel surcharge, detention, layover, lumper, toll, accessorial, and customer-specific financial rule calculation.

internalModules.title: Accessorial rules engine
internalModules.description: Computes eligible charges using contract terms, facility events, documents, and approvals.

interfaces.title: Accessorial API
interfaces.description: Provides charge eligibility and calculation outputs to audit, settlement, and quote workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses arrival, departure, and dwell data for detention eligibility.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Fuel index data providers
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Uses published fuel index values for surcharge calculation.

dataDependencies.description: Stores contract financial rules, indices, accessorial terms, and calculation results.

subGroups.name: Data and optimization
subGroups.description: Analytics, scorecards, workflow experimentation, data platform, and decision governance.

bricks.name: Performance Analytics and Scorecards
bricks.description: Shipper, carrier, lane, facility, operations, service, cost, emissions, and financial performance analytics.

internalModules.title: Freight KPI semantic layer
internalModules.description: Standardizes metric definitions for service, cost, margin, productivity, quality, and emissions.

interfaces.title: Analytics UI
interfaces.description: Scorecards and dashboards for shippers, carriers, operations, and leadership.

brickDependencies.description: Uses governed operational and financial datasets.

dataDependencies.description: Stores governed KPI definitions, metric values, and scorecard outputs.

bricks.name: Freight Data Platform
bricks.description: Canonical freight data model, event streams, data quality, warehouse, feature store, metric layer, lineage, and governance.

internalModules.title: Freight event backbone
internalModules.description: Normalizes shipment, tender, visibility, document, invoice, risk, and communication events.

interfaces.title: Data products and feature APIs
interfaces.description: Governed access to operational analytics, ML features, and metric datasets.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Operational databases and data warehouse
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Ingests and serves freight operational and analytical data.

dataDependencies.description: Stores normalized event streams and canonical entities for the domain.

bricks.name: Experimentation and Decision Governance
bricks.description: Controlled rollout, A/B tests, policy decisions, pricing experiments, routing guide tests, and model governance.

internalModules.title: Decision policy registry
internalModules.description: Tracks experiments, rule versions, model versions, approvals, guardrails, and outcomes.

interfaces.title: Experimentation API
interfaces.description: Assigns variants and records exposure/outcome events.

brickDependencies.description: Writes exposure and outcome events to governed data platform.

dataDependencies.description: Stores experiments, variants, decisions, exposure events, outcomes, and approvals.

bricks.name: Emissions and Sustainability Insights
bricks.description: Shipment emissions estimates, mode-shift scenarios, carrier sustainability attributes, shipper reporting, and carbon-aware optimization signals.

internalModules.title: Emissions calculator
internalModules.description: Estimates shipment and lane emissions by mode, distance, equipment, carrier, and load factor.

interfaces.title: Sustainability reporting API
interfaces.description: Provides emissions metrics to planning, analytics, and shipper reporting surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses mode alternatives for emissions and cost tradeoffs.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Emissions factor datasets
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Uses accepted emissions factors and carrier sustainability data.

dataDependencies.description: Stores shipment, lane, carrier, and mode emissions calculations and assumptions.
